body: Suresh, let's create a corporate bulk thali package. Peer restaurants like yours see a 25% increase in sales with similar offers. I propose a ₹1299 package for 10 thalis, valid on weekdays. We can promote it for 4 weeks, starting May 1st. Want me to draft the post and set it up?
rationale: Using specificity, social proof, and effort externalization to propose a concrete plan, with a clear CTA to approve the plan.

body: Let's launch a 4-week kids yoga summer camp at Zen Yoga Studio! Based on peer trends, I suggest 3 classes/week, ₹1999/camp. We can start on May 5th. Want me to draft the post and create the package?
rationale: Providing a concrete proposal with specific numbers and offering to execute, leveraging category trends and peer data to support the plan, using urgency and social proof compulsion levers.

body: Hi Aditya, it's been a while since your last visit to Karim's Salon on 2026-04-01. We'd love to have you back! As a valued customer, we're offering you a special deal - book an appointment tomorrow and get 10% off on your next service. Would you like to book now?
rationale: Using customer's history and offering a specific incentive to win them back, with a low-friction CTA.

body: Namaste Riya, aapko 25 din ho gaye humare salon se aaeye. Aaj kal kaisa hai aapka hair aur skin? Kal ke liye appointment book karna chahti hain? Abhi book kijiye, hum aapko 10% discount denge.
rationale: Using customer's visit history and language preference to create a warm and personalized message, offering a specific discount incentive for a low-friction CTA.

body: Summer is here! Stock up on ORS, sunscreen, and antifungal meds. Your customers need them. Run a themed offer like 'Summer Care Kit @ ₹499' to boost sales. You're already doing great with Free Home Delivery > ₹499 and Senior Citizen 15% OFF. Should we create a summer-themed post for your Google Business Profile?
rationale: Using specificity and social proof, suggesting a concrete action to leverage summer trends and referencing current offers to encourage a themed promotion.

body: JIDA Oct 2026 reports a 3-month fluoride varnish recall reduces caries recurrence by 38% in high-risk adults. With 124 high-risk adults in your cohort, reassessing recall intervals may be beneficial. I can help draft a patient education post or pull the abstract for you. DCI also revised radiograph dose limits, effective Dec 15. Source: JIDA Oct 2026, p.14, and Dental Council of India circular 2026-11-04
rationale: Sharing relevant research and compliance updates, connecting it to the merchant's specific situation and offering assistance, using specificity and actionable items as compulsion levers

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma, aapki chronic medicine ki refill due hai. Aapke liye Senior Citizen 15% OFF ka offer hai. Aapki 24 visits mein humne aapko chronic_rx_metformin, chronic_rx_atorvastatin, aur chronic_rx_telmisartan ki services di hai. Kya aapko abhi order karna hai?
rationale: Using customer's history and language preference to offer a specific incentive, with a low-friction CTA to encourage a response.

body: Hi Vivaan, it's been a while since your last visit on 2026-04-01. We've missed you at Bright Smile Dental! As a valued patient who has visited us 5 times, we'd like to invite you for a check-up. Since we don't have any active offers currently, we can discuss a personalized plan for you. Would you like to schedule an appointment?
rationale: Using specificity and reciprocity to re-engage the customer, with a low-friction CTA to schedule an appointment.

body: Noticed a new listing near you - Smile Studio, 1.3 km away, offering Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Your current offer is ₹299. With a 4.4 rating and 1820 views, your clinic has a strong reputation. How would you like to respond to this new competition?
rationale: Using curiosity framing and social proof to inform the merchant about the new competitor, while suggesting a defensive action to maintain their market position.

body: Noticed a new South Indian restaurant listing near Mylari in Indiranagar, Bangalore. With your 4.2 rating and popular Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149, you're well-positioned. What would you like to do to stay ahead?
rationale: Using curiosity framing and social proof to inform the merchant about the new competitor, while suggesting a defensive action to stay ahead in the market.

body: Priya's balayage skills are a hit! With 12 positive reviews in the last 30 days, what service do you think is in demand this week at Studio11 Family Salon? Maybe it's time to promote your popular Hair Spa @ ₹499?

body: Hi, Vera here. Quick check-in on your curious_ask_due update.

body: Hi Rashmi, it's Karthik from PowerHouse Fitness. We've missed you! You've had 22 great visits with us, focusing on weight loss. Try us again with 3 FREE Trial Classes. When are you free to discuss your next steps?
rationale: Using customer's history and previous focus area to personalize the message, offering a specific incentive, and a low-friction CTA to re-engage the lapsed customer.

body: Hi Reyansh, it's been 32 days since your last visit to Asha Dental Care. We've missed you! As a valued patient who's visited us 5 times, we'd like to offer you a Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Would you like to book an appointment?
rationale: Using specificity and loss aversion, reminding the customer of their history and offering a specific service at a discounted price to win them back.

body: Namaste Reyansh, aapko 72 din ho gaye Daily Care Medicos se door. Aapki 12 visits ki yaad dilate hue, hum aapko phir se apne paas bulana chahte hain. Abhi apne next purchase par 5% discount paayein. Kya aap kal se phir se medicine lena chahte hain?
rationale: Using specificity and reciprocity to re-engage the customer, offering a 5% discount on their next purchase.

body: Anjali, it's been 38 days since we last spoke about your expired subscription. Your salon's performance has dipped 12% in views and 30% in calls over the past week. Are you ready to revive your profile and attract more customers like the 380 unique ones you've had this year?
rationale: Using loss aversion and social proof to prompt the merchant to re-engage, anchoring on specific performance metrics and customer numbers.

body: Hi Anand, your Chai Point Cafe has had 2189 views in the last 30 days, but we've seen a slight drop in engagement. Would you like to discuss ways to boost customer interaction?
rationale: Using loss aversion and curiosity levers to prompt the merchant to take action and discuss ways to improve engagement.

body: Diwali is coming! With 188 days to go, you can get a head start. Consider running a Diwali-themed offer, like a 'Festival Hair Package' or updating your Google Business Profile post to attract more customers. Your current offers, like 'Haircut @ ₹99' and 'Hair Spa @ ₹499', are already doing well. Would you like me to help you create a Diwali offer?
rationale: Using the festival as a compulsion lever, suggesting a concrete action to capitalize on the upcoming event, and referencing their current offers to build on their existing performance.

body: Diwali is coming! Get a head start, Pooja. Offer a festive fitness package @ Bend & Burn. What's your plan?
rationale: Using specificity and early-mover advantage to encourage Pooja to create a festive offer, leveraging the upcoming Diwali festival to drive engagement.

body: Vikas, your Sunrise Medicos listing has 720 views in the last 30 days, but as an unverified business, you might be missing out on 30% more customer engagement. Would you like to verify your business via postcard or phone call to increase trust with your customers?
rationale: Using loss aversion and social proof compulsion levers, highlighting the potential 30% increase in customer engagement to encourage verification.

body: IPL match tonight! DC vs MI at Arun Jaitley Stadium. Will you run a special offer for match fans? Your 'Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free' is already popular, consider a themed twist?
rationale: Connecting IPL match to SK Pizza Junction's business, suggesting a concrete action to leverage the event, and referencing their current offer.

body: Hi Suresh, you're just 5 reviews away from reaching 150 reviews! Your Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 has been a hit, with 22 positive reviews in the last 30 days. Would you like to incentivize customers to leave a review and reach this milestone?
rationale: Using social proof and loss aversion, highlighting the proximity to the milestone and the success of the Weekday Lunch Thali offer to encourage the merchant to take action.

body: Hi Mukesh, congrats on a milestone! Your Pizza Spot in Aundh, Pune has served 889 unique customers this year. Would you like to create an offer to attract more customers and increase sales?
rationale: Using social proof and specificity to spark curiosity, encouraging the merchant to create an offer to attract more customers.

body: Calls down 50% in the last 7d. You're missing 2 potential patients daily. Want me to draft 3 fresh posts to boost visibility?
rationale: Using loss-aversion framing and offering a specific fix to recover from the performance dip, with a binary CTA to prompt action.

body: Hi Sushma, your views are down 0% in the last 7d. You're still doing better than the average salon with a 0.058 CTR. Want me to help you draft some fresh posts to attract more customers?
rationale: Using loss-aversion framing and offering a specific fix to help the merchant recover from the performance dip, with a binary CTA to prompt action.

body: Congratulations Padma! Your calls are up 15% in the last 7 days, with 18 calls in the baseline period. This spike is likely driven by your recent kids yoga post. What's your next move to sustain this momentum?
rationale: Celebrating the win with specific numbers and attributing it to a recent post, while suggesting next action to sustain momentum using open-ended CTA.

body: Your views are down 0% in the last 7d. You're still performing better than peers with a 0.041 CTR. Want me to help you create fresh posts to attract more customers?
rationale: Using loss-aversion framing and offering a specific fix to help the merchant recover from the dip in performance.

body: Namaste Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic yahaan. Aapki last visit 2026-05-12 ko hui thi, ab 6 months ho gaye hain. Aapke liye weekday evening slots available hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Kaunsa slot aapke liye suitable hai?
rationale: Using specificity and loss aversion, reminding Priya of her last visit and offering specific slots matching her preference, along with the service price.

body: Hi Diya, it's been a while since your last visit to Zen Yoga Studio. We've missed you! As a valued member, we'd like to invite you for a regular checkup this week. We have slots available on Wednesday at 5 PM, Thursday at 7 AM, or Friday at 6 PM. Our First Month membership is available at ₹499. Which day works best for you?
rationale: Using specificity and social proof, we're reminding Diya of her last visit and offering specific slots to encourage her to book a checkup, while also highlighting the First Month membership price.

body: Dental Council of India's recent circular (2026-11-04) revises radiograph dose limits, effective 2026-12-15. Given your clinic's high-risk adult cohort and recent engagement, it's crucial to audit your X-ray setup. I can help draft a patient-ed post or pull the abstract for your review. How would you like to proceed?
rationale: Sharing relevant compliance update, connecting it to the merchant's situation, and offering assistance to help them take action.
